headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -38.2)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 61% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate today with 140 quotes and an unusually high proportion of strong-intensity reactions (113 of 140), driving the score sharply up from 17.9 to 47.3.
• Frustrations sit in the upper third of their 163-day range, while Fears remain near the lower end and Optimism has dropped to its lowest point in the period after being near neutral yesterday.
• The steep overnight slide in Optimism (from -0.3 to -21.2) is the most notable day-over-day shift, suggesting the same issues fuelling frustration are also dampening positive sentiment.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
